title: emelista tora
intro: Emelista tora is a plant species, also known as Elephant Head, that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Emelista tora include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing fever and relieving headaches. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used orally or topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
